Experiences

Intern at Research and Statistics Department

June 2017 - August 2017
The Central Bank of Mongolia, Mongolia
  • Worked on in-house paper on using Google Trends to forecast key economic indicators, and used Python for the analytics.
  • Designed a semi-automated excel workbook for consolidating data from multiple excel files using VBA.
  • Analyzed historical and economic effects of weighted interest rates for loan, savings and deposits of commercial banks.

    • Software Engineering Intern

    May 2017 - June 2017
    HDE, Inc., Tokyo, Japan
  • Twitter Clone: Web application built using AWS, S3, Redis, Python, Flask, Google OpenID SSO and hosted with NGINX/Gunicorn. And wrote comprehensive test cases using unittest and Mock.
  • DevOps: Training on testing, deployment and integration using CircleCi and chef cookbooks using Ruby.
  • Internal Document Searching Tool: Using Python and Flask, integrated Slack message searching feature into the company’s document searching tool used by the sales and technical divisions.
  • Technical Talk: On Machine Learning techniques to the core engineering department and the upper management.

    • Research Intern

    June 2016 - July 2016
    Newcom LLC, Mongolia
  • Coded a simulation for the demand load by leveraging NYC’s real-time electricity data using Python and IoT modules.
  • Completed a 60-page feasibility study on $22 million utility scale solar park and a full study of dynamic pricing of electricity
  • Worked under direct supervision of Project Director and CEO, and consulted with the experts from various departments.
  • Referenced over 20 qualitative and quantitative academic papers and in-house reports.
  • Presented the final outcome of the analyses and the resulting investment benefits to the senior management and the CEO

    • Teaching Assistant

    January 2016 - May 2017
    Purdue University, West Lafayette, IN
  • Led Python programming laboratory sessions, graded student coursework and proctored exams.

    • Program Coordinator

    August 2015 - Present
    Zorig Foundation, Mongolia
  • Organize a college preparation and youth leadership program sponsored by the U.S. Embassy.
  • Lead sponsorship deals, procure ground logistics and recruit staff from top U.S. universities and colleges.
  • Manage over 40 project staffs and participants and led panel discussions with top experts from various industries.

    • Projects

    Machine Learning - Implemented Apriori and Naïve Bayes classifier for Yelp dataset with 14 attributes using Python.
    Graphic Flowchart - Built a backend of multiplatform GUI using Qt framework and C++.
    Boolean Satisfiability Problem - Coded backtracking algorithm that solves NP-complete problem using Java.
    Dynamic Text Generator - Application that generates semantically accurate sentences based on text files using Java.
    Book Search - Online book searching Android app built during Hack the Anvil 2015.
    Web Dev - Made a complete website for the youth leadership program using Jekyll, HTML5, CSS and JS.
